name: How does knowledge graph and entity file generation actually work?

mainEntity.name: How does knowledge graph and entity file generation actually work?

acceptedAnswer.text: The process usually includes cleaning source data, extracting entities, defining relationships, resolving duplicates, and validating the final structure. After that, the entity file is aligned to the graph schema so it can be loaded into your system or used for downstream AI and search workflows.
acceptedAnswer.description: Clean the data, extract entities, define relationships, deduplicate, validate, and align the final file to the schema.

description: Clean the data, extract entities, define relationships, deduplicate, validate, and align the final file to the schema.
